[cmcc] BCA 120 Introduction to Computer Applications 3 class hrs., 0 lab²hrs., 15 wks., (3 cr) This is an introductory computer²course that is structured to familiarize the student with usage²of computers as a tool for business and industry.²Taking a hands-on approach, students will become skilled in the²use of Windows XP and Microsoft Office XP. These competencies²include the operation of word processing, spreadsheets,²database and presentation software. All learning will be in a lab²environment where students will directly apply instructions using²individual computers. Prerequisite: Students should be²familiar with basic mouse and keyboard operation prior to²registration (CS)
